The friendliest
check-in app
you'll ever use.

Snap a photo of any paper roster. Herder turns it into a smart, live check-in list with automated guardian notifications — in under 30 seconds.

Arrival confirmed · just now

From paper list to live check-in
in 3 steps

01

📸

Upload or snap

Photo, spreadsheet, or paste. Gemini AI extracts every name and column automatically.

02

🗂️

Map & customize

Confirm column mappings. Add allergies, pickup location — data that persists every session.

03

✅

Check in & notify

Tap to mark students present. Submit when done — notifications fire automatically.

Everything your class needs

Built for teachers who want attendance done — without the mess.

📸

Photo → Smart list

Snap any paper roster. Gemini AI reads every name and builds your live check-in list instantly.

☑️

Tap-to-check-in

One tap marks a student present. QR codes make future sessions even faster.

🔁

Recurring classes

Set a schedule once — your list reappears every session with custom data intact.

📲

Auto guardian alerts

SMS or email fires automatically when check-in is submitted. Guardians always know. (Pro)

🗂️

Custom columns

Allergies, pickup location, guardian phone — whatever your event needs, every session. (Standard+)

📊

Attendance history

Every session archived. Filter, export, and prove attendance for billing.

Simple, honest pricing

🐑 Free

$0/mo

  • ✓ 3 lists total
  • ✓ 20 names / list
  • ✓ Basic check-in
  • ✓ Notifications (BETA only)
Start free

🐄 Standard

$12/mo

  • ✓ Unlimited lists
  • ✓ Unlimited names
  • ✓ Custom columns
  • ✓ QR code check-in
  • ✓ Analytics
Get Standard

🦬 Pro

$29/mo

  • ✓ Everything in Standard
  • ✓ SMS & email notifications
  • ✓ Guardian alerts
  • ✓ Emergency broadcasts
  • ✓ Priority support
Get Pro

the clipboard?

Set up your first class in under 2 minutes. Free forever for individual teachers.
